title: Secret
content:
# Secret

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### create_secret(data: Optional[Union[requests.SecretCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.SecretCreate

Create a new Secret.


### list_secrets(pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.SecretItem], responses.SecretsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Secrets. The actual Secret itself can not be retrieved here and is only available from an App.


### delete_secret(secret_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete a Secret. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### update_secret(secret_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.SecretUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.SecretUpdate

Update an existing Secret with a new 'value'. Any parameters that are not provided will remain unchanged.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.secret.create_secret()
